content_body:
When we walked into this house with a Christmas tree lit and beautiful music playing in the background, we thought we were in a picture book. The pictures were just like the website - which is rare. Normally we are used to taking vacations in south Florida, or spending time in New York (where we are originally from). This is our new favorite location without-a-doubt. We already have plans to come for awhile in the summer.

The driveway was a little nerve wracking at first; however, after a few times of going up and down it became fun, it sort of reminded me of Six Flags. Why? Well, because my sister was screaming in my ear while I drove up and down ~ Everyday. My father, after lighting the fireplace, accidentally got too close to the fire and burnt off his eyebrows, eyelashes and facial hair which earned him the new nickname "fireface".  At nighttime you may feel a little uneasy because it's the woods, you're on top of a mountain, and it's quiet. It's safe though, so don't worry.

Everyday we went to lunch at The Beanery located downtown. Try the tomato basil soup - Amazing! The antique shops were interesting - they had many beautiful things. Unfortunately my mother packed 10 duffle bags of clothes for a week, same for my sister. We couldn't fit anything else into our Hummer. (which is quite sad)! My sister and brother-in-law tried the jacuzzi one day, they said it wasn't bad. But, we all agree doing it in 23 degree weather probably wasn't the best idea.

Try the bowling ally downtown - the owners were very nice. It wasn't busy when we went, of course that's when I bowled my best game. This really was a great getaway.  The owner was helpful and the house was what we were looking for. I hope whoever is reading this has an amazing time.
title: New Yorkers Find Their Favorite Vacation Spot in the Blue Ridge Mountains
